title: chrTickBeams minimal reimpl: H4 actiontype dispatch collapsed (HIGH), H5 BACKGROUND_AI bit, H6 held-weapon obj leak, H7 visibility coarsening

history.note: RE-VALIDATION REQUIRED before ACT (FID-0062): this finding was seeded from compare_combat_trace --align move, which has a ~2x sim-tick skew (record-index vs sim-tick). RE-CAPTURE dam route both-sides under --align tick (now the trustworthy combat mode, combat_oracle_fields.md#12) before root-causing. Much of the reported guard divergence is likely alignment artifact + the systemic RNG call-count phase (FID-0063), NOT a chr.c/stan.c logic bug.
